arts.ttl: Arsenal-Nottingham Forest lineups confirmed as Declan Rice, Bukayo Saka decisions made
arts.sum: Declan Rice fails to make the starting lineup for Arsenal's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest, but Bukayo Saka is in the first XI alongside Jorginho.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Nottingham Forest, Premier League updates and more: football – live
arts.sum: Everton v Brentford, Aston Villa v Crystal Palace Follow updates from all 3pm games | Email Simon Today’s fixtures are an absolute triumph for first-half-of-the-alphabet top-flight home teams. Just look at that array of A to M action! Sure, this year’s Premier League is 70% first-half-of-the-alphabet anyway, but today fully 85.7% of the 14 teams in action, and 100% of the sides playing at home, lounge triumphantly in the upper half of the alphabet table. Good old Guardian, you can rely on us to bring you all the key stats, can you not? And better still you can also rely on us to bring you all of the day’s key goal updates, and between now and approximately 5pm GMT this will be the place to find them. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups and more
arts.sum: Follow all the action from Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Mikel Arteta's side look to reignite title challenge plus updates from Everton vs Brentford, Bournemouth vs Brighton and Aston Villa vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Arsenal take on Nottingham Forest plus the rest of the afternoon's 3pm kick-offs.

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star Nicolas Pepe appears to confirm his marriage to Fanny B is over just days after he was spotted with adult film actress Teanna Trump
arts.sum: Winger Pepe married influencer Fanny B back in 2017 and they share two children. However, the ex-Arsenal star was recently spotted on a date with adult film actress Trump.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make five surprise changes vs Forest LIVE!
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are flying so high they are on Arsenal's radar. Fourth meets fifth in north London, with kick off between Arsenal and Nottingham Forest at 3pm.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid answer Arsenal transfer question as Edu replacement begins new contract talks - Jake Stokes
arts.sum: football.london says: "Arda Guler would have been an exciting signing for Arsenal, but he wouldn't play much more than he already does at Real Madrid – not even Ethan Nwaneri can get regular game time under Mikel Arteta! football.london says: "Nottingham Forest are no walkovers and Arsenal will need to be at their very best to win all three points this weekend.

arts.ttl: I was Arsenal hero but had more nights out than games after Nottm Forest move
arts.sum: Ramsey had been signed from Cardiff in 2008 but a double leg break had sidelined him for nine months and he needed to regain fitness. He would return to Arsenal before another loan spell this time at his beloved Cardiff before returning to the Gunners and pressing on.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Gunners can ill afford any further slip-ups as they bid to get back into the title race

arts.ttl: Arteta ‘in love’ with midfield star with ‘ASTRONOMICAL’ Arsenal offer rumoured
arts.sum: Reijnders is a player that the Arsenal boss would love to sign, according to Fichajes, which reports that “everything indicates that the Gunners are willing to make a significant financial effort to secure his signing”. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is “in love” with AC Milan midfielder Tijjani Reijnders, according to a report.
